info.name: Approach3-CompoundStress-MultiContract-100K-30d-iter3
info.description:
APPROACH 3 (iter3): COMPOUND STRESS вЂ” Multi-Contract /eventsBatch
with All 8 Stablecoin Behavioral Models + Market Risk Post-Processing

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
WHAT'S NEW IN iter3 vs iter2:
  iter2: 5 contracts, 4 phases, 2 risk metrics (backing + liquidity)
  iter3: 6 contracts, 5 phases, ALL 8 behavioral models + market risk

BEHAVIORAL MODELS (from Risk-Factor-2.md Domain 5 вЂ” implemented in
actus-riskservice/utils/stablecoin/*.java, post-processed here):
  1. BackingRatioModel    вЂ” reserves/supply with MtM adjustments
  2. RedemptionPressureModel вЂ” 609-event calibrated redemption curves
  3. MaturityLadderModel  вЂ” nearest maturity, roll/keep decision
  4. AssetQualityModel    вЂ” HQLA degradation (bank/sovereign stress)
  5. ConcentrationDriftModel вЂ” HHI across asset types/custodians
  6. ComplianceDriftModel  вЂ” STABLE/GENIUS/MiCA continuous check
  7. EarlyWarningModel    вЂ” 4-signal composite (curve/orderbook/CEX/sentiment)
  8. ContinuousAttestationModel вЂ” ZK-ready data structure

MARKET RISK (from StableCoin-MarketRisk-RateShock-100K-30d.json):
  Interest rate shock (+50bps) affects T-bill mark-to-market
  Duration-based MtM haircut applied in post-processing

PORTFOLIO ($100,000 stablecoin reserves вЂ” 6 ACTUS PAM contracts):
  cash-reserve-001:    $12,000  (overnight, HQLA L1, quality=100)
  operating-cash-001:  $10,000  (overnight, HQLA L1, quality=100)
  tbill-4wk-001:       $18,000  (28-day, HQLA L1, quality=100)
  tbill-13wk-001:      $28,000  (91-day, HQLA L1, quality=100)
  tbill-26wk-001:      $22,000  (182-day, HQLA L1, quality=100)
  commpaper-90d-001:   $10,000  (90-day commercial paper, HQLA L2A, quality=85)

COMPOUND STRESS SCENARIO (30-day horizon):
  Day 1:  BASELINE вЂ” all metrics healthy, MINT ALLOWED
  Day 8:  EARLY WARNING + MILD STRESS вЂ” 2/4 signals fire,
          $6K redemptions, peg deviation 0.3%, rate +25bps
  Day 15: COMPOUND CRISIS вЂ” 4/4 signals MAX_DEFENSIVE,
          peg 1.5%, rate +50bps, CP issuer downgraded,
          cash nearly depleted в†’ MINT HALTED
  Day 22: RECOVERY вЂ” 4-wk T-Bill matures ($18Kв†’cash),
          peg recovering, signals fading в†’ MINT RESTORED
  Day 28: LIFECYCLE DASHBOARD вЂ” full summary

REFERENCE IMPLEMENTATIONS:
  Behavioral models: actus-riskservice/utils/stablecoin/*.java
  Market risk data:  StableCoin-MarketRisk-RateShock-100K-30d.json
  Early warning:     StableCoin-EarlyWarning-30d.json
  Multi-contract:    StableCoin-TreasuryBacked-MultiContract-100K-30d.json
  Redemption curves: RedemptionPressureModel.java (609-event calibration)
  Asset quality:     AssetQualityModel.java (HQLA degradation)
  Risk Factor docs:  Risk-Factor-2.md (38 models), Risk_FACTOR_1.md

PREREQUISITES:
  - actus-server on localhost:8083 (no risksrv3 needed)
  - Open Postman Console (Ctrl+Alt+C) before running

Based on ACTUS official documentation:
  https://www.actusfrf.org/taxonomy
  https://www.actusfrf.org/dictionary

exec: // PHASE 1: BASELINE вЂ” ALL 8 BEHAVIORAL MODELS + MARKET RISK
// в”Ђв”Ђ Market Risk Parameters (Day 1 вЂ” no shock yet) в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
// в”Ђв”Ђ Early Warning Signals (Day 1 вЂ” all quiet) в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
// в”Ђв”Ђ Duration map for MtM rate sensitivity (modified duration) в”Ђ
console.log('  APPROACH 3 iter3 вЂ” PHASE 1: BASELINE (Day 1)');
console.log('  6 contracts, ALL 8 behavioral models + market risk');
// в”Ђв”Ђ AssetQualityModel: MtM = face Г— (1 - duration Г— rateShock/10000) в”Ђв”Ђ
assetBreakdown[cid] = { face: notional, mtm: mtmValue, quality: quality, type: assetType };
if (assetType === 'cash' || cid.indexOf('operating') >= 0) { cashFace += notional; cashMtM += mtmValue; }
else if (assetType === 'tbill') { tbillFace += notional; tbillMtM += mtmValue; }
else if (assetType === 'commpaper') { cpFace += notional; cpMtM += mtmValue; }
// в”Ђв”Ђ 4. AssetQualityModel (computed above per contract) в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
qualityScore: avgQuality, hhi: hhi, wam: wam,
console.log('  рџ“Љ FULL RISK DASHBOARD вЂ” BASELINE (Day 1)');
pm.test('P1: Early Warning NORMAL', function() { pm.expect(ewPosture).to.equal('NORMAL'); });

exec: console.log('  APPROACH 3 iter3 вЂ” PHASE 2: EARLY WARNING + MILD STRESS (Day 8)');
console.log('  вљ пёЏ 2/4 early warning signals fire, $6K redeemed, +25bps rate shock');
var totalFace=0, totalMtM=0, cashFace=0, cashMtM=0, tbillFace=0, tbillMtM=0, cpFace=0, cpMtM=0;
if (notional === 0) events.forEach(function(e) { if (e.type === 'MD' && e.payoff > 0) notional = e.payoff; });
console.log('  ' + cid + ': face=$' + notional.toLocaleString() + ' MtM=$' + mtm.toFixed(0) + ' Q=' + quality.toFixed(0));
console.log('  рџ“Љ FULL RISK DASHBOARD вЂ” EARLY WARNING (Day 8)');
console.log('  Total MtM:       $' + totalMtM.toFixed(0) + ' vs Supply $' + tokenSupply);
console.log('  Rate Shock:      +' + rateShockBps + 'bps в†’ MtM haircut on T-bills');
console.log('  Bank Stress:     ' + bankStressIndex + ' (CP issuer on watch)');

exec: // Rate shock + peg deviation + bank stress + all 4 EW signals
console.log('  APPROACH 3 iter3 вЂ” PHASE 3: COMPOUND CRISIS PEAK (Day 15)');
console.log('  рџљЁ Rate +50bps | Peg -1.5% | Bank stress 0.6 | 4/4 EW signals');
var totalFace=0, totalMtM=0, cashFace=0, cashMtM=0, tbillFace=0, tbillMtM=0, cpFace=0, cpMtM=0;
if (notional === 0) events.forEach(function(e) { if (e.type === 'MD' && e.payoff > 0) notional = e.payoff; });
console.log('  ' + cid + ': face=$' + notional.toLocaleString() + ' MtM=$' + mtm.toFixed(0) + ' Q=' + quality.toFixed(0));
console.log('  рџ“Љ FULL RISK DASHBOARD вЂ” COMPOUND CRISIS (Day 15)');
console.log('  MtM Reserves:    $' + totalMtM.toFixed(0) + ' vs Supply $' + tokenSupply);
console.log('  MtM Haircut:     -$' + (totalFace-totalMtM).toFixed(0) + ' from +' + rateShockBps + 'bps shock');
console.log('  Cash Coverage:   ' + cashCoverageDays.toFixed(2) + ' days в†ђ CRITICAL');
console.log('  Nearest Maturity: 13 days (4-wk T-Bill) вЂ” TOO FAR');
console.log('  Action:          EMERGENCY вЂ” consider early liquidation');
console.log('  Rate Shock:      +' + rateShockBps + 'bps (T-bill MtM degraded)');
console.log('  Bank Stress:     ' + bankStressIndex + ' (CP issuer DOWNGRADED)');
console.log('  Signals:         ' + ewSignals + '/4 в†’ ' + ewPosture + ' рџљЁ');
console.log('  CEX:             ' + cexOutflowMult.toFixed(1) + 'x рџ”ґ | Sentiment: ' + sentimentZscore.toFixed(1) + 'z рџ”ґ');

exec: // 4-week T-Bill matured в†’ $18K cash inflow, peg recovering
console.log('  APPROACH 3 iter3 вЂ” PHASE 4: T-BILL RECOVERY (Day 22)');
console.log('  вњ… 4-wk T-Bill matured: $18K в†’ cash. Peg recovering.');
var totalFace=0, totalMtM=0, cashFace=0, cashMtM=0, tbillFace=0, tbillMtM=0, cpFace=0, cpMtM=0;
if (notional === 0) events.forEach(function(e) { if (e.type === 'MD' && e.payoff > 0) notional = e.payoff; });
console.log('  ' + cid + ': face=$' + notional.toLocaleString() + ' MtM=$' + mtm.toFixed(0) + ' Q=' + quality.toFixed(0));
console.log('  рџ“Љ FULL RISK DASHBOARD вЂ” RECOVERY (Day 22)');
console.log('  Cash Coverage:   ' + cashCoverageDays.toFixed(1) + ' days в†ђ HEALTHY');
pm.test('P4: EW posture NORMAL', function() { pm.expect(ewPosture).to.equal('NORMAL'); });
console.log('в•‘  APPROACH 3 iter3: COMPOUND STRESS LIFECYCLE DASHBOARD                     в•‘');
console.log('в•‘  6 PAM Contracts | 8 Behavioral Models | Market Risk Post-Processing       в•‘');
console.log('в•‘    4-wk T-Bill:   $18K (matures Day 28) вЂ” HQLA L1                        в•‘');
console.log('в•‘    13-wk T-Bill:  $28K (matures Day 91) вЂ” HQLA L1                        в•‘');
console.log('в•‘    26-wk T-Bill:  $22K (matures Day 182) вЂ” HQLA L1                       в•‘');
console.log('в•‘    90-day CP:     $10K (matures Day 90) вЂ” HQLA L2A                        в•‘');
console.log('в•‘  Phase в”‚ Day в”‚ Backing в”‚ Liq   в”‚ Quality в”‚ EW Signal  в”‚ Mint              в•‘');

console.log('в•‘  P1   в”‚  1  в”‚ ' + (p1b*100).toFixed(1) + '%  в”‚ ' + (p1l*100).toFixed(1) + '% в”‚ ' + p1q.toFixed(0) + '     в”‚ ' + p1e.substring(0,10).padEnd(10) + ' в”‚ ' + p1m.substring(0,12) + '      в•‘');

console.log('в•‘  P2   в”‚  8  в”‚ ' + (p2b*100).toFixed(1) + '%  в”‚ ' + (p2l*100).toFixed(1) + '% в”‚ ' + p2q.toFixed(0) + '     в”‚ ' + p2e.substring(0,10).padEnd(10) + ' в”‚ ' + p2m.substring(0,12) + '      в•‘');
